nav_descriptions.dashboard: Overview of your net worth and cash flow.
nav_descriptions.accounts: Manage your bank accounts, cards, and limits.
nav_descriptions.transactions: Register and track your income and expenses.
nav_descriptions.budget: Distribute your income and plan your monthly spending.
nav_descriptions.debts: Control who owes you money and what you owe to others.
nav_descriptions.goals: Create medium and long-term financial objectives.
nav_descriptions.insights: Smart reports on your spending habits.
nav_descriptions.investments: Track the evolution, yield, and distribution of your portfolio.
nav_descriptions.settings: Account settings, profile, and income distribution templates.
nav_descriptions.help: Find explanatory articles, clear your doubts, and submit feedback.

settings.hide_balances_desc: Hides balances and amounts for privacy

dashboard.net_worth_desc: The sum of everything you own (positive balance) minus what you owe.
dashboard.income_desc: All the money that entered your accounts during the current month.
dashboard.expense_desc: All the money that went out of your accounts during the current month.
dashboard.balance_desc: The amount of money left over after subtracting your expenses from your income.
dashboard.flow_evolution_desc: Comparative chart showing how income and expenses behaved day by day this month.
dashboard.top_categories_desc: The categories where you spent most of your money this month.
dashboard.pending_transactions_desc: Future entries that have not yet been marked as cleared in the account.

debts.title: Debts
debts.desc: A simple management of receivables (people who owe you) and payables (your own debts).
debts.me_devem_desc: Money you lent or receivables. When paid, they turn into Income.
debts.minhas_dividas_desc: Money you borrowed. When paid, they turn into Expense.

landing.hero_subtitle: Take full control of your financial life with smart budgeting, debt management, and global multi-currency support. No boring spreadsheets, just results.
landing.banner_text: Available and synced in real-time across all your devices.
landing.banner_sync_desc: Your transactions, goals, and balances updated instantly across all your devices.
landing.banner_security_desc: Your data is transmitted 100% securely via HTTPS with state-of-the-art SSL/TLS encryption and cloud backups.
landing.banner_biometrics_desc: Keep your balances and accounts protected and hidden instantly in a native and integrated way.
landing.features_title: Everything you need, in one place.
landing.features_subtitle: Tools designed for those who take financial health seriously.
landing.feature_budget_desc: Give every cent a job and never wonder where your money went again.
landing.feature_global_desc: Real-time support for over 160 world currencies and native translation to 12 languages.
landing.feature_debts_desc: Track exactly who owes you and what you owe others, with payment history.
landing.feature_accounts_desc: Manage all your bank accounts, balances, and credit card limits in one place.
landing.feature_goals_desc: Create goals, track visual progress bars, and achieve your biggest dreams.
landing.feature_privacy_desc: Hide all your balances with a single click to use the system safely in public environments.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when you want total control.
landing.pricing_free_desc: For those just starting to get organized.
landing.pricing_pro_desc: Everything you need to master your finances.
landing.faq_q1: Can I cancel at any time?
landing.faq_a1: Yes. You can cancel your subscription whenever you want, without penalty and no questions asked.
landing.faq_a2: We use SSL encryption, secure session authentication, and never sell your data.
landing.faq_q3: Does Vault Finance OS work in any country?
landing.faq_a3: Yes. The system was designed to be fully global, natively supporting over 160 currencies and translated into 12 languages, ready to use from anywhere in the world.
landing.faq_q4: Is there a truly free version?
landing.faq_a4: Yes. The Free plan is free forever, ideal for those just starting to organize themselves.
landing.cta_title: Ready to change your relationship with money?
landing.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of people who achieved financial clarity with Vault Finance OS.
landing.cta_note: No credit card required • Cancel anytime
